Planets in midheaven or aspiring to be midhe~n are to be treated
accordingly, Secondly. when there are no planet in the 10tn house from
the Moon or the birth sign, then find out the rulers of the lot11 house
counted from the Lagna, the Sun and the Moon. Take the strongest of
them. Fin<! out in what Navamsa he is. The ruler of that Navarnsa will
influence the profession. According to Bhattotpala. it is not correct to
predict the profession by considering the strongest alone of planets (1
posited in the 1<111 house reckoned from the Lagna and the Moon or
{2) owning the lOth house counted from the Lagna. the Sun and the
Moon. Every one of these, should be taken into consideration while
determining the source of income of the native.
